```{r}
                     Parkin_down = Parkin_down,
                     Retina = retina_gene_list$gene_id,
                     GPCR = GPCR_gene_list$gene_id
)

DEG_STRING_upset_3 <- upset(fromList(DEG_STRING_3), 
      nintersects = 40, 
      nsets = 8, 
      order.by = "freq", 
      decreasing = T, 
      mb.ratio = c(0.6, 0.4),
      number.angles = 0, 
      text.scale = 1.1, 
      point.size = 2.8, 
      line.size = 1
)

# pdf("figures/DEG_STRING_upset_3.pdf", width = 8, height = 5)
# DEG_STRING_upset_3
# dev.off()
```

[Figure 56](figures/DEG_STRING_upset_3.pdf)

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: "Figure 56.  Intersections between Parkin DEGs and STRING clusters."
DEG_STRING_upset_3
```

### STRING clusters validation using GSEA
```{r}
#| include: false
Retina <- unique(retina_gene_list$gene_id)
GPCR <- unique(GPCR_gene_list$gene_id)

df.Retina <- data.frame(gene_name = Retina, group = "Retina")
df.GPCR <- data.frame(gene_name = GPCR, group = "GPCR")

custom_genesets.Parkin <- rbind(df.Retina, df.GPCR)

gseaDEG.Parkin_1 <- GSEA(geneList = ranks.Parkin, TERM2GENE = custom_genesets.Parkin[c(2,1)], eps = 0, pAdjustMethod = "fdr", 
                pvalueCutoff = 0.05, seed = 13)

gseaDEG.Parkin_2 <- GSEA(geneList = ranks.lrrk2, TERM2GENE = custom_genesets.Parkin[c(2,1)], eps = 0, pAdjustMethod = "fdr", 
                pvalueCutoff = 0.05, seed = 13)

gseaDEG.Parkin_3 <- GSEA(geneList = ranks, TERM2GENE = custom_genesets.Parkin[c(2,1)], eps = 0, pAdjustMethod = "fdr", 
                pvalueCutoff = 0.05, seed = 13)

gseaDEG.Parkin_4 <- GSEA(geneList = ranks.B, TERM2GENE = custom_genesets.Parkin[c(2,1)], eps = 0, pAdjustMethod = "fdr", 
                pvalueCutoff = 0.05, seed = 13)

gseaDEG.Parkin.df_1 <- as.data.frame(gseaDEG.Parkin_1)
rownames(gseaDEG.Parkin.df_1) <- NULL

gseaDEG.Parkin.df_4 <- as.data.frame(gseaDEG.Parkin_4)
rownames(gseaDEG.Parkin.df_4) <- NULL

gsea.parkin_list <- c(gseaDEG.Parkin_1, gseaDEG.Parkin_4)

gsea_3 <- GSEAmultiGP(gsea_list = gsea.parkin_list,
            geneSetID = "GPCR",
            exp_name = c("Parkin vs Healthy","LRRK2 vs Parkin"), 
            legend.position = "right", 
            curve.col = brewer.pal(n = 4, name = "Set1")[c(3,4)])
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
datatable(gseaDEG.Parkin.df_1[c(2:9)], 
          caption = "Table 52. Functional coherence of STRING/MCL clusters validated through Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA), demonstrating concordant enrichment of cluster-specific pathways in phenotype-ranked expression data (Parkin vs Healthy).",
          style = "bootstrap5", 
          extensions = 'Buttons', 
          options = list(dom = 'lBfrtip', 
              buttons = c('csv', 'excel')))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
datatable(gseaDEG.Parkin.df_4[c(2:9)], 
          caption = "Table 53. Functional coherence of STRING/MCL clusters validated through Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA), demonstrating concordant enrichment of cluster-specific pathways in phenotype-ranked expression data (LRRK2 vs Parkin).",
          style = "bootstrap5", 
          extensions = 'Buttons', 
          options = list(dom = 'lBfrtip', 
              buttons = c('csv', 'excel')))
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=4.5}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
download_this(
  gsea_3,
  output_name = "DEGgsea_3",
  output_extension = ".pdf",
  button_label = "PDF",
  button_type = "primary"
)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=4.5}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: "Figure 57. Functional coherence of STRING/MCL clusters validated through Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA), demonstrating concordant enrichment of cluster-specific pathways in phenotype-ranked expression data (GPCR)."
gsea_3
```

## Table 54. Comparison of DEG results in Parkinson's disease models (LRRK2 vs. Parkin)
| Feature | LRRK2 | Parkin | Biological Interpretation |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Potassium Homeostasis** | ↑ Expression of VGPC and ion transport genes | ↑ Expression of VGPC and ion transport genes | **Common Mechanism:** |
| **Signaling Pathways** | ↓ WNT signaling | ↓ WNT signaling | **Common Mechanism:** |
| **Genomic Stability** | ↓ Chromatin segregation genes | ↓ Chromatin segregation genes | **Common Mechanism:** |
| **Synaptic Function** | ↑ Glutamatergic synapse genes | — | **LRRK2-Unique:** |
| **Extracellular Matrix** | ↓ Extracellular matrix (ECM) genes | — | **LRRK2-Unique:** |
| **Immune Response** | ↓ Interferon signaling | — | **LRRK2-Unique:** |
| **Receptor Signaling** | — | ↓ GPCR genes | **Parkin-Unique:** |
